The '''New Republic Third Fleet''' was a major [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] unit of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. Activated in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] under the personal command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], the fleet was involved in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends#The advance of the New Republic (4-6 ABY)|New Republic liberation campaign]] up to the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|capture of Coruscant]], and then became a major defensive command based at [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The Third Fleet acted as a rapid reaction force during the [[Thrawn campaign]], and in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] fought in the [[Imperial Skirmishes]], helping deal a final defeat to the [[Imperial Remnant]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], amid heavy losses in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Third Fleet was reorganized along with the rest of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]] as the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Third Fleet]].

==Operational History==
The New Republic Third Fleet was led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It fought [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Peccati Syn|Syn's]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|liberation of Kashyyyk]]. The Third Fleet, under the command of Admiral [[Nammo]], was defeated in [[Battle of Bilbringi (6 ABY)|battle]] at the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] by Admiral [[Teren Rogriss]] and the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

After its capture, the [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']] was assigned to the Third Fleet. After the [[Almanian Uprising]], it and the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] were sent to battle the [[Imperial Remnant]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="TNEC" />

In preparation of the [[Battle of Fondor]], it was stationed at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. It later became the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Third Fleet]].

The ''[[Jantol]]'' and ''[[Farlight]]'' were part of this fleet.
